name: Orange-Berry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour a 10-inch bundt pan.
3. In a large bowl, whip the butter until creamy.
4. Blend in the sugar, vanilla extract, eggs, and egg yolks. Beat until well blended.
5. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, alternately with heavy cream, and mix until smooth.
7. Stir in the orange juice.
8. Add both the grated lemon peel and lemon juice.
9. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and bake for 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then turn it onto a rack and remove from the pan to cool completely.
11. Dust with confectioners' sugar and garnish with berries and mint leaves before serving.
